zh.lifeSummary: 當Berthe de Blois於1013年出生在法國崔洛易-吉黑布盧瓦時，她的父親Eudes II le Champenois de Blois28歲，母親Ermengarde d'Auvergne23歲。她於1025年與Alain III dit Rebrit duc de Bretagne在法國崔洛易-吉黑布盧瓦結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1085年4月11日在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉哈特雷-德-布利塔尼享年72歲，埋葬在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉哈特雷-德-布利塔尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Berthe de Blois于1013年出生在法国崔洛易-吉黑布盧瓦时，她的父亲Eudes II le Champenois de Blois28岁，母亲Ermengarde d'Auvergne23岁。她于1025年与Alain III dit Rebrit duc de Bretagne在法国崔洛易-吉黑布盧瓦结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1085年4月11日在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉哈特雷-德-布利塔尼享年72岁，埋葬在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉哈特雷-德-布利塔尼。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Blois
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Blois in Loire-et-Cher and, in some cases possibly also from a place of the same name in Jura. Compare   Deblois  .
French: nickname from the Old French adjective blois ‘lisping’.

variants.name: Bloise
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rolando, Salvatore, Biagio, Carmelo, Giulio.  Spanish Alejandro, Ines, Jose, Juan Antonio, Luis.
Italian (Calabria): from French Blois . The surname Bloise is also found in southern France (Bouches-du-Rhône) and in the Dominican Republic.
English (Suffolk): variant of   Blois  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Deblois
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Rosaire, Amelie, Damien, Emile, Fernand, Herve, Jacques, Jean Guy, Monique, Ovide.
French: habitational name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, for someone from Blois (see Blois ).

nameMeanings.name: Berthe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Berthe de Blois was born in 1013, in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France, her father, Eudes II le Champenois de Blois, was 28 and her mother, Ermengarde d'Auvergne, was 23. She married Alain III dit Rebrit duc de Bretagne in 1025, in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died on 11 April 1085, in Chartres-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, at the age of 72, and was buried in Chartres-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Berthe de Blois est née en 1013, à Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France, son père, Eudes II le Champenois de Blois, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Ermengarde d'Auvergne, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Alain III dit Rebrit duc de Bretagne en 1025, à Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 11 avril 1085, à Chartres-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterrée à Chartres-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Berthe de Blois 1013 in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Eudes II le Champenois de Blois 28 und ihre Mutter Ermengarde d'Auvergne 23. Sie hat 1025 in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Frankreich Alain III dit Rebrit duc de Bretagne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 11. April 1085 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Chartres-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich und wurde in Chartres-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Berthe de Blois è nata il nel 1013 nel Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia, sua padre, Eudes II le Champenois de Blois, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Ermengarde d'Auvergne, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Alain III dit Rebrit duc de Bretagne nel 1025, nel Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 11 aprile 1085, nel Chartres-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolta a Chartres-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Berthe de Bloisが1013年にフランスセントアロイル-エト-チャーブロイスで生まれた時，父Eudes II le Champenois de Bloisは28歳，母Ermengarde d'Auvergneは23歳であった。1025年にフランスセントアロイル-エト-チャーブロイスでAlain III dit Rebrit duc de Bretagneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1085年4月11日にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインチャートレス-デ-ブレタグンで72歳で死去し，フランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインチャートレス-デ-ブレタグンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Berthe de Blois(이)가 1013년 프랑스 세트르 로이-트-처 블로이스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Eudes II le Champenois de Blois(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ermengarde d'Auvergne(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1025년 프랑스 세트르 로이-트-처 블로이스에서 Alain III dit Rebrit duc de Bretagne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1085년 4월 11일 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 처트레스-데-브레타그니에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 처트레스-데-브레타그니에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Berthe de Blois nasceu em 1013, em Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, França, seu pai, Eudes II le Champenois de Blois, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Ermengarde d'Auvergne, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Alain III dit Rebrit duc de Bretagne em 1025, em Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 11 de abril de 1085, em Chartres-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, com 72 anos, e foi sepultada em Chartres-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Berthe de Blois родилась в 1013 г. в местности блоис, лоир-ет-чир, кентр, Франция, её отцу по имени Eudes II le Champenois de Blois было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Ermengarde d'Auvergne, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alain III dit Rebrit duc de Bretagne в 1025 г. в местности блоис, лоир-ет-чир, кентр, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла 11 апреля 1085 г. в местности чартрес-де-бретагн, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция в возрасте 72 лет и была похоронена в местности чартрес-де-бретагн, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Berthe de Blois nació en 1013, en Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia, su papá, Eudes II le Champenois de Blois, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Ermengarde d'Auvergne, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Alain III dit Rebrit duc de Bretagne en 1025, en Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 11 de abril de 1085, en Chartres-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultada en Chartres-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia.
